## Weekly Review Pulse: Week 24 (2026-06-09)

Here are the top themes extracted from recent Google Play Store reviews:

### Theme: Random Session Logouts
**Verbatim Quotes:**
- "The app keeps logging me out randomly when I try to check my mutual funds."

**Actionable Ideas for Product/Engineering:**
- Investigate session token expiration logic specifically on Android v2.4.1
